title: Light Garlicky Uruguayan Cucumber Casserole
description: A comforting and pillowy Uruguayan dish featuring cucumber, garlic, and kombu cold extract, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This halal-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with olive oil.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until softened.
Add the sliced cucumbers to the skillet and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked cucumber mixture, softened cream cheese, kombu cold extract, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the casserole.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
